title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. creticum
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. creticum, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. creticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and act as a natural remedy for various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although its efficacy and safety need further research.
